result.stdout:
Unknown action: '--help'
Usage - QuickEncrypt <action> 

Actions

  EncryptAes <FileName> <OutFile>  - Encrypt The Specified File With The Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) Algorithm

    Option           Description
    FileName* (-F)   The input file for the program to read the data from
    OutFile* (-O)    The output file for the program to write the output data to

  DecryptAes <FileName> <OutFile>  - Decrypt The Specified File With The Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) Algorithm

    Option           Description
    FileName* (-F)   The input file for the program to read the data from
    OutFile* (-O)    The output file for the program to write the output data to

  EncryptDes <FileName> <OutFile>  - Encrypt The Specified File With The Data Encryption Standard (DES) Algorithm

    Option           Description
    FileName* (-F)   The input file for the program to read the data from
    OutFile* (-O)    The output file for the program to write the output data to

  DecryptDes <FileName> <OutFile>  - Decrypt The Specified File With The Data Encryption Standard (DES) Algorithm

    Option           Description
    FileName* (-F)   The input file for the program to read the data from
    OutFile* (-O)    The output file for the program to write the output data to

  EncryptRc2 <FileName> <OutFile>  - Encrypt The Specified File With The Rivest Cipher 2 (RC2) Algorithm

    Option           Description
    FileName* (-F)   The input file for the program to read the data from
    OutFile* (-O)    The output file for the program to write the output data to

  DecryptRc2 <FileName> <OutFile>  - Decrypt The Specified File With The Rivest Cipher 2 (RC2) Algorithm

    Option           Description
    FileName* (-F)   The input file for the program to read the data from
    OutFile* (-O)    The output file for the program to write the output data to

  EncryptTripleDes <FileName> <OutFile>  - Encrypt The Specified File With The Triple Data Encryption Standard (TDES) Algorithm

    Option           Description
    FileName* (-F)   The input file for the program to read the data from
    OutFile* (-O)    The output file for the program to write the output data to

  DecryptTripleDes <FileName> <OutFile>  - Decrypt The Specified File With The Triple Data Encryption Standard (TDES) Algorithm

    Option           Description
    FileName* (-F)   The input file for the program to read the data from
    OutFile* (-O)    The output file for the program to write the output data to

  Md5 <filename>  - 

    Option      Description
    filename*   The filename to be hashed

  Sha1 <filename>  - 

    Option      Description
    filename*   The filename to be hashed

  Sha256 <filename>  - 

    Option      Description
    filename*   The filename to be hashed

  Sha384 <filename>  - 

    Option      Description
    filename*   The filename to be hashed

  Sha512 <filename>  - 

    Option      Description
    filename*   The filename to be hashed
